title: Patch Bridge: Closing the Detection-to-Remediation Gap in CVE Lifecycle Management
description: Existing vulnerability scanners stop at detection. Patch Bridge closes the gap from disclosure to verified remediation through reachability analysis, formal soundness proofs, and automated mitigation synthesis. Extends the panic-attack static analysis framework with three contributions: (1) reachability-filtered CVE triage that eliminates false positives by proving whether vulnerable code paths are actually exercised, (2) a formal model of mitigation soundness using Idris2 dependent types, and (3) a PanLL panel for human-in-the-loop adoption gating.
notes: Patch Bridge originated as a module within panic-attacker and has been extracted into a standalone project. The paper and implementation are self-contained.
